历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4617 → 4517 → 5008 → 8084 → 5298. In 2024, there was an abnormal significant drop (8084th place), but in 2025 it rebounded notably to 5298th place. The fluctuations have been severe in the past two years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 5298. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for Physics Category was 76 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 83 in 2023, 81 in 2024, and 79 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 91 students, an increase of about 15.2% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and has a certain diluting effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 22nd on the main list, and has been stable in the 21–22 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to the lingering impact of the 2019 study partner incident. It ranks 20th in comprehensive popularity on Douyin (high heat), with high short video exposure. In terms of historical admission anomalies, signals such as the 2022 Shaanxi enrollment gap, the 2023 decline in journalism and communication majors' rankings, and the 2024 Sichuan science admission score drop of 63 points indicate that the university has experienced admission fluctuations in some provinces, but the ranking has clearly rebounded in 2025, and admission confidence is recovering. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 19 disciplines rated A- or above: Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Control Science and Engineering A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Clinical Medicine A-, Law A-, Physics A-, Biology A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Pharmacy A-, Software Engineering A-, etc. Mathematics is the flagship discipline, and majors such as Clinical Medicine and Computer Science correspond to strong disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communications (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), and Clinical Medicine (recommended) are highly matched with the university's advantageous disciplines, making them attractive for applications. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 297,000). Physics Category candidates, estimated at about 69% of the total in recent years, are about 206,000, with a slight increase in the competition base. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province (not the local province), and its enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5%–2%, which is cross-provincial enrollment. As a major education province, Shandong has a certain regional appeal to candidates from the southwest region, but there is no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant recovery trend in the 2025 ranking, the dilution effect of the approximately 15.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 on competition, the sustained appeal of the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines, the attention boost from high Douyin popularity, and the slight pressure from a marginal increase in total candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 5731, with a range of 5231–6231.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5231), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>6231), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical category in Guizhou Province has risen significantly for five consecutive years: 2021: 3779 (plan: 10) → 2022: 4414 (plan: 9) → 2023: 5008 (plan: 11) → 2024: 8280 (plan: 15) → 2025: 11977 (plan: 13). Among them, 2024 rose by 3272 places compared to 2023, and 2025 rose by another 3697 places compared to 2024, with a significantly expanded increase. The 2026 enrollment plan is 17, an expansion of about 30.77% compared to 2025's 13, a relatively large expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, one of the first batch of key construction universities in the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). The university's comprehensive strength ranks among the top in the country, with a long history in medical disciplines. The Qilu Medicine brand enjoys a high reputation both domestically and internationally, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology facing particularly intense competition. Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong, an eastern coastal province. As a 985 university, it has strong appeal to candidates in Guizhou Province. The limited enrollment quota for medical categories within Guizhou Province, coupled with supply-demand contradictions, drives the continuous rise in rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation and the continuous upward trend of historical rankings, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 14219, with a fluctuation range of 13792 to 14646. The ranking will continue to rise compared to 2025, reflecting the unabated popularity of medicine and changes in the competitive landscape after expansion.
